ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., wind tunnel experiment, flight test, CFD simulation) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., aerodynamics, fluid dynamics) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the dataset (e.g., public, private, team-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "xcoord" REAL /* X-coordinate of the data point */,
  "ycoord" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the data point */,
  "zcoord" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the data point */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the data point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the data point */,
  "total_density" REAL /* Total density at the data point */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity at the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* ID of the specific experiment or test run */,
  "simulation_id" TEXT /* ID of the specific simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_properties" (
  "derived_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived property */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the derived property belongs to */,
  "total_dynamic_viscosity" REAL /* Total dynamic viscosity at the data point */,
  "total_gruneisen" REAL /* Total Gruneisen parameter at the data point */,
  "total_enthalpy" REAL /* Total enthalpy at the data point */,
  "total_vorticity" REAL /* Total vorticity at the data point */,
  "total_mach_number" REAL /* Total Mach number at the data point */,
  "total_strain_rate" REAL /* Total strain rate at the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_properties_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermodynamic_properties" (
  "thermodynamic_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermodynamic property */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the thermodynamic property belongs to */,
  "total_isobaric_specific_heat" REAL /* Total isobaric specific heat at the data point */,
  "total_isochoric_specific_heat" REAL /* Total isochoric specific heat at the data point */,
  "total_speed_of_sound" REAL /* Total speed of sound at the data point */,
  "total_entropy" REAL /* Total entropy at the data point */,
  "total_specific_volume" REAL /* Total specific volume at the data point */,
  "total_thermal_expansion_coefficient" REAL /* Total thermal expansion coefficient at the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thermodynamic_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermodynamic_properties_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_properties" (
  "transport_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport property */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the transport property belongs to */,
  "total_thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Total thermal conductivity at the data point */,
  "Reynolds" REAL /* Reynolds number at the data point */,
  "Prandtl" REAL /* Prandtl number at the data point */,
  "total_diffusivity" REAL /* Total diffusivity at the data point */,
  "total_viscosity" REAL /* Total viscosity at the data point */,
  "total_conductivity" REAL /* Total conductivity at the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_properties_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_flow_rates" (
  "mass_flow_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mass flow rate */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the mass flow rate belongs to */,
  "mass_flow_rate" REAL /* Mass flow rate at the data point */,
  "total_mass_flow_rate" REAL /* Total mass flow rate at the data point */,
  "mass_flow_rate_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the mass flow rate (e.g., x, y, z) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mass_flow_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mass_flow_rates_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
